prompt: What did you have for breakfast today?
hindiPrompt: आज आपने नाश्ते में क्या खाया?
sampleAnswer: I had bread and eggs for breakfast. I also had a cup of tea.

prompt: Describe a day when you were not feeling well.
hindiPrompt: एक ऐसे दिन के बारे में बताएं जब आप ठीक नहीं थे।
sampleAnswer: I had a fever last Monday. I also had a headache. I had to stay in bed.

prompt: Talk about a great party or event you attended.
hindiPrompt: किसी शानदार पार्टी या कार्यक्रम के बारे में बताएं।
sampleAnswer: We had a birthday party last Saturday. We had delicious food. Everyone had a great time.

prompt: Describe a difficult journey you had.
hindiPrompt: किसी मुश्किल सफर के बारे में बताएं।
sampleAnswer: We had a very long journey last summer. We had car trouble on the way. We had to stop twice.

prompt: Tell about a conversation you had recently.
hindiPrompt: हाल ही में हुई किसी बातचीत के बारे में बताएं।
sampleAnswer: I had an interesting conversation with my friend yesterday. We had many topics to discuss.

prompt: What kind of day did you have yesterday?
sampleAnswer: I had a busy day yesterday. I had three meetings. I had lunch at my desk.

prompt: Describe a memorable vacation or trip.
hindiPrompt: किसी यादगार छुट्टी या यात्रा का वर्णन करें।
sampleAnswer: We had a wonderful trip to Goa last year. We had lovely weather. We had amazing seafood.

prompt: Tell about a dream you had.
hindiPrompt: किसी सपने के बारे में बताएं जो आपको आया था।
sampleAnswer: Last night I had a strange dream. I had a conversation with my old teacher in the dream.

prompt: Describe a difficult time in your life.
hindiPrompt: जीवन के किसी कठिन दौर के बारे में बताएं।
sampleAnswer: Two years ago, I had a very hard time. I had financial problems. I had to work extra hours.
tips: Use 'I had' for problems and challenges.

prompt: Talk about a celebration in your family.
hindiPrompt: परिवार में किसी उत्सव के बारे में बताएं।
sampleAnswer: We had a big celebration for my sister's wedding. We had many guests. We had traditional food.
